recommendations.title: The Gay Divorcee
recommendations.overview: Seeking a divorce from her absentee husband, Mimi Glossop travels to an English seaside resort. There she falls in love with dancer Guy Holden, whom she later mistakes for the corespondent her lawyer hired.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.

recommendations.title: Girl
recommendations.overview: A promising teenage dancer enrolls at a prestigious ballet school while grappling with her gender dysphoria.

recommendations.title: Limelight
recommendations.overview: A fading music hall comedian tries to help a despondent ballet dancer learn to walk and to again feel confident about life.
